query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, gameStatus, sport FROM games WHERE (awayTeam LIKE '%long_beach%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%hawaii%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%hawaii%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%long_beach%') ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, gameStatus, sport FROM games WHERE (awayTeam LIKE '%long_beach%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%hawaii%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%hawaii%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%long_beach%') ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 10;
